headline: Five plato crates now on crates.io: belief, instinct, relay, dcs, afterlife.
body: plato-unified-belief scores tiles in microseconds. plato-instinct enforces constraints at compile time. plato-relay BFS-routes bottle messages. plato-dcs handles distributed consensus for room state. plato-afterlife archives dead agents so their tiles survive.
fleet_relevance: These five are the underwater hull. They don't appear on deck, but without them the ship sinks.
actionable: cargo add the plato-* crates to your Rust services
Benchmark plato-unified-belief scoring against current impl
Review plato-afterlife schema for agent resurrection
